sections.label: Verse 1
lines: An le leengtui gam ka tung zo
A phatna teng kei a hi zo
Keima khuamial leng mang zo hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aw gam nuampi a pha gampi
Mualsang tung pan ka galet a

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong Honpa kei tawh hong vakkhawm
Nuam takin kei tawh hong om khawm
A khut in dam takin hong kai
Vantung gamgi ciang dong ka nai

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Huih nung hiauhiau tawh hong kizui
A vul ngei lo paakte palhin
Hinna lui luang a tawntung in
